expert_identification.description: Woman with long light brown/blonde hair, floral print top, cooking 3 pancakes simultaneously with smooth professional technique
expert_identification.confidence: High - demonstrates clear expert pancake-making skill with proper technique and multiple pancakes

operations.reason: Extract 60-second window containing expert pancake-making sequence from full source video
Convert landscape to portrait by center-cropping to 9:16 ratio, keeping cooking action (hands, pan, food) centered and visible
Scale portrait crop to target 1080x1920 resolution for high-quality social media vertical video
Add burned-in captions breaking the pancake-making process into clear sequential steps

parameters.preservation: Original cooking and dialogue audio kept throughout
parameters.normalization: Maintains original loudness without clipping or artifacts

operations.reason: Preserve original cooking sounds and audio cues while ensuring quality audio output

checks_performed: ffprobe source video duration and codec verification
Visual inspection of expert pancake-making sequence via sampled frames
Crop calculation for 9:16 portrait ratio from 16:9 landscape source
Caption timing and positioning verification in output
Audio codec and bitrate verification (AAC 48kHz stereo maintained)
Final output duration check (60.19s within 55-65s target)
Video codec verification (H.264 with high profile)
Aspect ratio verification (101:180 display ratio = 9:16 portrait)
No black bars or padding detected - true portrait crop applied
Pan, hands, spatula, and plated food visible in cropped frame
